symbols.\\sin: Sine — opposite over hypotenuse in a right triangle

symbols.\\cos: Cosine — adjacent over hypotenuse in a right triangle

symbols.\\tan: Tangent — opposite over adjacent, or sin/cos

steps.description: Any nonzero number divided by itself equals 1
